system.descriptor: Commerce covers a character's understanding of markets, trade, currency, and economic systems across the Imperium.
system.uses:
Uses: Evaluating the worth of goods, haggling for better prices, understanding trade networks and supply chains, locating rare or restricted items through mercantile contacts, appraising items.
Special Use: Evaluate: Make a Commerce test to determine the approximate value of any trade goods, artefacts, or other items. Degrees of Success reveal more specific information about provenance and demand.

description.value: Commerce covers a character's understanding of markets, trade, currency, and economic systems across the Imperium.
